## Source: ossf-package-analysis (8b6dade7daa9669ae0230e60fbdcca448ec07c3e0386b27e324be83e525cadca)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'yelp-react-component-badge' @ 99.0.4 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
